description: Perfect for a day at the beach or a picnic these sandals from puma add style with comfort for that uber cool way to pamper your feet Upper Fabric and rubber overlap with mesh on the fabric and perforations on the rubber all provide enhanced breathability Velcro closure for added durability Midsole PU midsole with hexagonal massage nubs placed for underfoot cushioning and ergonomical comfort Outsole TPU outsole wih lugs placed on the forefoot, backfoot and the pediphery of the midfoot for maxium traction Brand logo on the midfoot for enhanced grip Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
